positive: Minimalist geometric astronaut silhouette, floating amongst stylized celestial rings and geometric nebula clusters. The astronaut is in a clean, powerful pose, viewed from the side, emphasizing the clean outline and strong contrast. Color palette: deep indigo, cosmic cyan, pops of neon magenta and electric lime green against a void black background. High contrast, linework art style, flat design, suitable for screen printing, centralized composition, highly detailed but clean, 8k illustration.
negative: low resolution, grainy, blur, noise, artifact, watermark, text, signatures, bad anatomy, messy, disfigured, extra limbs, ugly, photorealistic, messy details
